role_adherence_notes.linguistic: Correctly identified the absence of text and remained within the domain of script/language analysis.
role_adherence_notes.landscape: Focused on terrain, soil, and climate cues consistent with the Anatolian plateau.
role_adherence_notes.botanics: Analyzed vegetation types (steppe, scrub) and their biogeographical relevance.
role_adherence_notes.regulatory: Analyzed infrastructure standards (transformers, poles, fencing) as regulatory/infrastructure markers.
role_adherence_notes.meta: Synthesized cross-domain features (architecture + infrastructure) to distinguish regions.

verdict.overall_verdict_notes: The pipeline correctly identified Turkey. The agents provided high-quality, image-grounded evidence, particularly regarding the specific infrastructure (transformer/poles) and landscape features. The tournament effectively used this evidence to eliminate competitors.

visual_consistency_notes.landscape: Descriptions of hills, soil, and roofs match the image.
visual_consistency_notes.botanics: Descriptions of steppe/scrub vegetation match the image.
visual_consistency_notes.regulatory: Descriptions of the transformer and poles match the image.
visual_consistency_notes.meta: Synthesis of visual cues is accurate.
